text: i bought a twenty thousand dollar first
class airplane ticket from new york to
paris just to taste the food on board
well okay technically it was eighteen
thousand six fifty six and ninety seven
cents close enough i know it sounds
crazy but before you judge you're gonna
wanna see what they serve on board
either way i'm already at the airport
and it's too late to back out now in
fact i showed up so early worried i'd
miss a flight the price of a decent car
there were no attendants at the gate yet
and my flight was air france's first of
the day so i had to wait i grabbed a
quick crispy chicken sandwich at
mcdonald's quite ironic given what i'm
about to eat on the plane and i waited
finally a few attendants showed up and i
headed to check it which was this
special area off to the side for their
la premier affair there was even a
lounge to sit and wait in as they
checked my bags and eventually i was
escorted all the way through the airport
they even brought me from this fancy
secret room to security and finally i
made it to the pre-flight lounge where i
sat and was given a menu that's fancier
than at most high-end restaurants and
keep in mind this is the pre-flight meal
supposedly nothing compared to the
actual thing on the plane i selected
foie gras a fancy french dish made of
duck liver that can cost around 50 a
pound as well as the mushroom risotto
which was fantastic i even got a nice
selection of french cheeses and the
butter was delicious i ate the whole
thing plain what i think we're about to
board so i'm gonna go get ready it's
time to fly
so i'm on the plane i have my own little
spot here and i got them before
everybody else but they're very very
kind and they said that i can film all
the food i don't know if you all know
this but i'm very shy so i was a little
bit nervous but we're gonna be good i'm
gonna film this whole thing for you guys
there are only four seats in first class
on this plane so it's going to be very
quiet and apparently that's what makes
it so special the food is curated by a
three michelin star chef and they even
have a wine program on board
and i love french
[Music]
the amuse bouche was very simple i would
say a really nice light way to start off
the meal i also didn't think i'd like a
little bite of toast as much as i did
but in reality it was a really high
quality piece of prosciutto after this
we moved on to the potato soup dish
which i have to say blew me away it was
creamy refined and they've given just
the perfect amount of soup and i'm
really not a soup guy yet i had
absolutely no problem finishing this
entire bowl of soup after that is when
things really went up a level
aside from a really nice high-end white
wine they brought over caviar and not
just any caviar they gave me an entire
tin of caviar to myself which is unheard
of you never get to have the whole thing
yourself yet suddenly here i was on an
airplane and eating a whole thing of
caviar alone
the second i opened the caviar i knew it
was high quality the eggs were perfect
and shiny and none of them had popped
spilling that oily mess all over the jar
instead the pearls were all perfect and
intact and the caviar tasted just as
good as it looked once or twice i also
look to my left and right to make sure
no one was watching even though no one
seeded to my left and just ate a giant
spoonful the french take their food
seriously and i don't know what they
think of this next up was this delicious
salad which had a wide range of things
in it i saw radishes baby shrimp
cucumber even these nice hunks of cheese
i wasn't as happy about this really long
red pepper that was in there but i never
get too upset if i find things like that
in my food because it's so easy to fix
that's why you've got a knife in the end
i felt like it would be nice to give the
salad a rating of all the salads i've
ever had in my life this is probably a
good seven and a half or eight out of
ten
one funny thing with my salad is that i
kept thinking there was a hair in it
which there wasn't it was just the logo
on the plate but you have to admit that
kind of looks like one and it's
basically my one and only pet peeve with
food just when i thought i couldn't get
any more excited about how well this
airplane food was done the server came
with my fish entree and he removed the
silver dome to reveal a beautifully
plated fish
i got to pour over my own creamy
fragrant sauce and immediately started
trying to get the well-rounded bite a
phrase i've coined to describe the
perfect bite that includes every element
of the dish you're eating the fish was
cooked extremely well although i will
say that the mashed potatoes were a
little bit sad even the salt and pepper
shakers are so fancy i kind of want to
take one home to finish things off i was
offered a simple cheese plate which i
think had some of the things similar to
what i ate in the pre-flight lounge and
all i really have is one simple comment
my suggestion not that i can give the
french any food advice would be to
remove the lettuce on the plate after
all sometimes simple is best and when
you agree the plate looks better this
way i polished off my white wine and it
was time to get ready for bed
[Music]
you know it's funny just when i thought
i was done with the meal they wouldn't
let me go without dessert and i got a
beautiful chocolate mousse
[Music]
so here's the deal it's time for bed now
and i think i mentioned that there's
only four seats in all of buccaneer and
everybody else is asleep beside me and
that's why i'm being pretty quiet but it
also tells me that i should probably get
some sleep because it's quite late they
gave me the extra large sleep kit i'm
not mad about it i'm a big guy they
could've asked i might have said large
but i'm i'm cool with it before bed i
wanted to open this little goodie thing
that they give you and i have no idea
what's inside the whole thing slides
open like this and first up it looks
like i got a comb i'm going to give this
thing a spin right now i guess this is
just if you want to do a little bit of
in-flight styling it's just a nice wood
comb i'll probably keep it then we got
ourselves a sleep mask what looks to be
some sort of lotion actually it's a
bunch of lotions and i gotta say this
one looks kind of fancy maybe i'll head
to the bathroom before bed and practice
my skincare routine there's also this
pair of earplugs as well as this very
heavy very fancy looking pen maybe i'll
take notes when breakfast rolls around
because i'm actually looking forward to
hopefully answering one simple question
at breakfast will they have a croissant
and will it be that perfect buttery
flaky that i always think of as coming
from paris i guess we'll find out
shortly time for bed
[Music]
it's morning i've just gotten up it's
actually not a terribly long flight and
it got a little bumpy in the middle so i
didn't sleep at all and i hate flying
however let's see what a 20 000
breakfast in the sky looks like for
breakfast i chose the french toast when
the french toast arrived i was excited
that like the entree it was covered by
that silver dome which often signifies
something special yet like our mashed
potatoes from earlier it just looked sad
but you know me good food is good food
and all it took was one bite to change
my tune it was soft custardy buttery a
very unique take on french toast yet so
delicious but next came perhaps the most
important test of the day would the
croissant pass the flakiness test indeed
it did in addition to tasting great that
thing sent flakes all over my lap and
that to me is the true test of a good
croissant next came the beautiful fruit
salad which looks simple but i have to
say might be the prettiest dish yet i
look at orange and grapefruit supremes
as the epitome of luxury so much effort
is required to make each individual
perfect piece and without the skin they
normally have the texture is completely
different sadly i then tasted the orange
juice which to my surprise was not
freshly squeezed
[Music]
i finished out my breakfast with a bit
more tea and a bit of brioche and then
on came the captain who said we'd be
landing shortly i've switched seats now
because i had two so i might as well try
out this one too to close things out
based on what i've experienced today i
actually think high-end dining on the
airplanes are quite simple you're paying
a lot of money for the experience
oftentimes i've just noticed that the
staff are far more attentive totally on
top of all your wants and needs and they
really thought of everything i'm not
gonna be doing this every day but at
least now i can say that i've
experienced the best of the best when it
comes to dining in this guy and so can
you i think we're landing so i gotta go
but as always happy cooking
[Music]
